title: Accurate Estimation of Context-Dependent False Discovery Rates in Top-Down Proteomics.
author: LeDuc RD Fellers RT Early BP Greer JB Shams DP Thomas PM Kelleher NL
content: S-EPMC6442365 PMC6442365 Accurate Estimation of Context-Dependent False Discovery Rates in Top-Down Proteomics. Within the last several years, top-down proteomics has emerged as a high throughput technique for protein and proteoform identification. This technique has the potential to identify
